source: W3C ARIA Authoring Practices Guide (APG) — https://www.w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg/patterns/
global_rules: All interactive elements must be reachable and operable by keyboard alone
Focus order must follow DOM order unless a logical alternative is explicitly coded
Focus must never be trapped outside of a modal — within a modal, it must be trapped
Never remove focus outline without replacing it with an equally visible alternative
Avoid tabindex values > 0 — they break natural DOM order and create maintenance nightmares

keys.action: Activate the button
Move focus to next focusable element
Move focus to previous focusable element

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Native <button> gets this for free. Avoid role='button' on <div> — also requires keydown handler.

keys.action: Move to next focusable element inside dialog (wraps at last element)
Move to previous focusable element inside dialog (wraps at first element)
Close the dialog and return focus to the trigger element

component_keyboard_patterns.focus_management: On open: move focus to first focusable element (or dialog title if content is complex). On close: return focus to the element that triggered the dialog.
component_keyboard_patterns.notes: NEVER stack two modal layers — use wizard patterns instead. Focus must be trapped inside the open modal.

keys.action: Move focus into the tablist (lands on active tab), then to tab panel content
Move focus between tabs in horizontal tablist (wraps)
Move focus between tabs in vertical tablist (wraps)
Move focus to first tab
Move focus to last tab
Activate tab if not automatically activated on focus
Remove tab if deletion is supported

component_keyboard_patterns.role_structure: tablist (container) → tab (each tab button) → tabpanel (each panel)
required_aria: aria-controls on each tab pointing to its tabpanel
aria-labelledby on each tabpanel pointing to its tab
component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Auto-activate on focus only if panel content loads instantly. If there is latency, require Enter/Space to avoid slow navigation.

keys.action: Open the dropdown
Move between options
Jump to first / last option
Select focused option and close menu
Close without selecting, return focus to trigger
Focus option matching typed character(s)

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Native <select> handles this automatically. Custom dropdowns require all of the above manually.

keys.action: Toggle panel expand/collapse
Move focus to next focusable element
Move between accordion headers
Jump to first / last accordion header

component_keyboard_patterns.role_structure: button (each header trigger) → region (each panel, aria-labelledby pointing to its header)
component_keyboard_patterns.notes: The trigger must be a <button> element. Never an <h2> directly — wrap inside.

keys.action: Toggle checked / unchecked

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Tri-state (indeterminate) for 'select all' where some children are selected. Use aria-checked='mixed'.

keys.action: Move focus into the group (lands on selected option or first)
Move to previous radio and select it
Move to next radio and select it

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Only selected radio is in tab order — arrow keys move within group. This differs from checkboxes.

keys.action: Open listbox, move focus to first suggestion
Open listbox, move focus to last suggestion
Close listbox, restore original value
Accept focused suggestion
Open listbox without moving focus to suggestion

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Live region (aria-live='polite') should announce count of matching suggestions as user types.

keys.action: Move focus between interactive cells
Navigate between cells in a grid role
Activate cell action or enter edit mode
Cancel edit mode, exit cell
Select row if row selection is supported

component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Static data tables use role='table'. Interactive (sortable, editable, selectable) use role='grid'.

keys.action: Show tooltip
Hide tooltip
Hide tooltip while keeping focus on trigger

required_aria: aria-describedby on trigger pointing to tooltip id
component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Tooltip delay on hover: 300–500ms to prevent flicker. Tooltip must NOT contain interactive content (links, buttons) — use a popover instead.

required_aria: role='alert' for urgent messages (NVDA/JAWS announce immediately)
component_keyboard_patterns.notes: Success toasts: role='status'. Error alerts: role='alert'. Never use both on same element. Auto-dismiss after 5–7s minimum. Provide manual dismiss.

focus_management_rules: On modal open: move focus inside the modal immediately
On modal close: return focus to the element that triggered it
On route change (SPA): move focus to page heading (h1) or a skip-link target
On dynamic content load: if content replaces focused element, move focus to replacement
For wizard/multi-step: on step change, move focus to the new step heading
For toast notifications: do NOT move focus — they are supplemental, use role='status'

skip_links.rule: Every page must have a skip navigation link as the first focusable element
skip_links.implementation: Position off-screen (not display:none) by default, reveal on focus with position:fixed top-left
targets: Skip to navigation (optional on complex apps)
skip_links.example_class: sr-only focus:not-sr-only focus:absolute focus:top-4 focus:left-4 focus:z-50 focus:p-3 focus:bg-bg-surface focus:border focus:border-accent focus:rounded
